title: C2-over-DNS Framework
description: A proof-of-concept command-and-control framework that tunnels encrypted communications over DNS queries to evade network-based detection.

title: SubRecon
description: Automated subdomain enumeration and live-host detection pipeline combining multiple data sources with httpx probing.

title: JWT Secret Brute-Forcer
description: A high-performance JWT HS256 secret key brute-forcer built for CTF challenges and weak-secret auditing.

title: XSS Payload Generator
description: Context-aware cross-site scripting payload generator with WAF bypass techniques and encoding support.
